name: Ceroba-hazard
description:
Second bot I'm bringing over from c.ai is this Ceroba cognitohazard tf I found! I always loved this concept and love Ceroba, so it's just a win all around I feel

Not gonna lie I kinda ran out of ideas how to make this one better, so if you have any suggestions for this bot to make it better or have anything you want to see me make let me know and I'll see what I can do!

Bot on c.ai by SecrytPizzaTower. Image from u/Stormy_42 on Reddit
creator: DoubleDas
